title: Holi Festival of Colours
description: Join us for a vibrant celebration of Holi! Enjoy colours, music, traditional sweets, and community spirit in the heart of Fredericton.

title: Diwali Night Gala 2026
description: Celebrate the Festival of Lights with dance performances, traditional cuisine, a cultural show, and fireworks. Black-tie welcome!

title: Newcomers Welcome Orientation
description: A warm welcome session for new Indo-Canadian arrivals. Learn about local resources, settlement services, healthcare, schools, and connect with our community.

title: Classical Indian Dance Workshop
description: An interactive Bharatanatyam and Kathak workshop for all ages. No experience required — just bring your enthusiasm!

title: Canada Day Indo-Canadian Picnic
description: A family-friendly picnic celebrating our dual heritage — proudly Canadian, proudly Indian. Expect cricket, food, and great company!

title: Youth Leadership Summit
description: A full-day summit for Indo-Canadian youth featuring guest speakers, mentorship sessions, career panels, and networking.
